programme.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.

programme.title: EPL Stories 2025/26 Ep.47 - Norwegian Strikers
programme.desc: Showcasing the personalities who have shaped the Premier League era, in each episode we tell their unique story that will be sure to engage and entertain all fans.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Barcelona and Atlético Madrid will meet for a fifth time in European competition, with all five coming at the quarter-final stage of the UEFA Champions League. Atlético Madrid have only lost one of their previous four UEFA Champions League games against Barcelona, and have eliminated the Catalan side in both of their previous knockout stage ties. Only Paris SG have eliminated Barcelona more times in the knockout stages of the European Cup/Champions League.

programme.title: EN EPL Moments 2025/26 Ep.9 - Gary Cahill
programme.desc: Former Premier League footballers discuss their top 10 Moments in the Premier League.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Brighton & Hove Albion - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: All 380 matches from the English Premier league are live and exclusive only on beIN. All matches are available live with a choice of Arabic or English commentary. The season will consist of 33 weekends and five midweek rounds of matches. Liverpool are the defending champions, having won their second Premier League title.

programme.title: Brighton & Hove Albion vs Chelsea - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 34
programme.desc: All 380 matches from the English Premier league are live and exclusive only on beIN. All matches are available live with a choice of Arabic or English commentary. The season will consist of 33 weekends and five midweek rounds of matches. Liverpool are the defending champions, having won their second Premier League title.

programme.title: EN Ligue 1 Show 2025/26 Ep.31
programme.desc: All the latest news from Ligue 1 in France.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.

programme.title: EPL Stories 2025/26 Ep.47 - Norwegian Strikers
programme.desc: Showcasing the personalities who have shaped the Premier League era, in each episode we tell their unique story that will be sure to engage and entertain all fans.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Barcelona and Atlético Madrid will meet for a fifth time in European competition, with all five coming at the quarter-final stage of the UEFA Champions League. Atlético Madrid have only lost one of their previous four UEFA Champions League games against Barcelona, and have eliminated the Catalan side in both of their previous knockout stage ties. Only Paris SG have eliminated Barcelona more times in the knockout stages of the European Cup/Champions League.

programme.title: Madrid Marathon 2026
programme.desc: Madrid Marathon, first held in 1978, is one of Spain’s leading road races. The event features three distances — marathon, half marathon and 10K — and drew a record 45,000 runners from 118 countries in 2025. The elite field competes for prize money, while the course is known for its city-center landmarks, crowd support and demanding rolling profile.

programme.title: Manchester City vs. Arsenal - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Manchester City are unbeaten in their last 10 Premier League home games against Arsenal since a 2-0 loss in January 2015 under Manuel Pellegrini. Arsenal are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Man City, having lost 12 in a row against them before this.

programme.title: Chelsea vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Chelsea have lost just one of their last 12 Premier League home games against Man Utd, and are looking to win three in a row against them at Stamford Bridge for the first time since April 2006. Following their 2-1 win in September, Manchester United are looking to complete the Premier League double over Chelsea for just the second time after the 2019-20 campaign.

programme.title: Burnley vs. Manchester City - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Burnley have won just one of their 19 Premier League games against Man City. They’ve lost their last 11 in a row against them, their longest ever losing run against an opponent in their league history. Manchester City have won 14 of their last 15 Premier League games against Burnley since a 1-0 loss at Turf Moor in March 2015.

programme.title: Everton vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Everton have won just one of their last 14 Premier League home games against Liverpool, though 10 of those games have finished level. Liverpool have won their last two Premier League games against Everton, though both have come at Anfield. They last won three consecutive league Merseyside derbies between April 2016 and April 2017.

programme.title: Rayo Vallecano vs Espanyol - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 33
programme.desc: Rayo Vallecano have lost their last four LaLiga matches against Espanyol, failing to score in the last two. Only between 2002 and 2012 have the Franjirrojos suffered five consecutive defeats against Espanyol in the top-flight. RCD Espanyol have won their last two away LaLiga matches against Rayo Vallecano and could win three consecutive away games against them for the first time in the competition's history.

programme.title: Lorient vs Marseille - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30
programme.desc: Olympique de Marseille have beaten Lorient more than any other side in Ligue 1, boasting a 60% win rate against them, which is also more than any other team. Lorient are currently on a 13-game winless run against Olympique de Marseille, their longest current drought against a top-flight side. Lorient have won just 12% of their home games against Olympique de Marseille in Ligue 1, their lowest win rate against a team they have hosted more than ten times in the top-flight.

programme.title: Angers vs Havre AC - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30
programme.desc: Angers have gone 10 consecutive Ligue 1 matches without scoring more than one goal against Le Havre, only managing to score more than once in the first of 11 meetings between the two sides in the division, on 1 October 1959. Angers have not lost any of their five home Ligue 1 matches against Le Havre, keeping three clean sheets in these encounters.

programme.title: Lille vs Nice - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30
programme.desc: Lille OSC have won just one of their last seven Ligue 1 matches against OGC Nice, a 2-1 victory at Pierre-Mauroy on 17 January 2025. Lille OSC currently have the best winning run and unbeaten run in Ligue 1. Lille OSC have even won their last two matches by more than two goals, a first since October 2020, but they have not done better since December 2009.

programme.title: Elche vs Atletico Madrid - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 33
programme.desc: Elche have not lost any of their last two LaLiga matches against Atlético de Madrid, after losing the previous 11, and could go three or more without defeat against them in the competition for the first time since February 1969. programme.title: Mallorca vs Valencia - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 33
programme.desc: Real Club Deportivo Mallorca are unbeaten in their last three home games against Valencia CF in LaLiga, while they have never gone four consecutive home matches without defeat against them in the competition's history. programme.title: Aix vs Saint-Raphaël - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Al Arabi vs Al Sadd - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W19
programme.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

programme.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

programme.title: World Athletics Race Walking Team Championships
programme.desc: The World Athletics Indoor Championships bring together the world’s leading male and female athletes, representing over 100 nations, including Olympic and world medalists. Over three days of elite indoor competition, athletes compete for world titles while aiming to deliver outstanding performances and challenge global records.

programme.title: World Athletics Race Walking Team Championships
programme.desc: The World Athletics Indoor Championships bring together the world’s leading male and female athletes, representing over 100 nations, including Olympic and world medalists. Over three days of elite indoor competition, athletes compete for world titles while aiming to deliver outstanding performances and challenge global records.

programme.title: Nîmes vs Toulouse - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Playoffs SF Leg 2 - Marmara Spike ligue Volleyball - 2026
programme.desc: France’s top men’s volleyball competition, the LNV Ligue A Masculine (Marmara SpikeLigue), delivers a season of elite clubs battling through a home-and-away league before the playoffs. Expect big serving, quick middle attacks, and high-level defense as teams chase points, seeding and the national title in a prime-time French showcase.

programme.title: World Athletics Race Walking Team Championships
programme.desc: The World Athletics Indoor Championships bring together the world’s leading male and female athletes, representing over 100 nations, including Olympic and world medalists. Over three days of elite indoor competition, athletes compete for world titles while aiming to deliver outstanding performances and challenge global records.

programme.title: NBA Action 2025/2026
programme.desc: NBA ACTION keeps pace with the competition on the court while offering viewers an inside look at teams and players from around the League, including several popular weekly segments

programme.title: Madrid Marathon 2026
programme.desc: Madrid Marathon, first held in 1978, is one of Spain’s leading road races. The event features three distances — marathon, half marathon and 10K — and drew a record 45,000 runners from 118 countries in 2025. The elite field competes for prize money, while the course is known for its city-center landmarks, crowd support and demanding rolling profile.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.desc: Ligue 2 is the second division of French football. Ligue 2 is contested by 18 clubs, the league operates on a system of promotion and relegation with both Ligue 1 and the third division Championnat National. The teams play 34 games each, totaling 306 games in the season. The biggest games from each match Day are live and exclusive on beIN.
